title: write_verilog: correctly emit asynchronous transparent ports

features.name: async transparent memory read with constant clock
features.description: Code should include an asynchronous memory read operation where the clock is a constant value (1'b0), which when incorrectly processed leads to always @(posedge constant) in generated Verilog
features.snippet: $memrd cell with CLK_ENABLE=0, CLK=1'0, TRANSPARENT=1, EN=1'1; generates invalid always @(posedge 1'h0)

features.name: transparent memory read port in procedural block
features.description: Code should include a memory read with TRANSPARENT=1 parameter that drives an address register via non-blocking assignment in an always block with async sensitivity

features.name: async memory port clock domain distinction
features.description: Code should include logic that distinguishes synchronous vs asynchronous memory ports by checking CLK_ENABLE, where async ports should not add clock to sensitivity list
features.snippet: parameter CLK_ENABLE 0; // async - clock should not be added to domain
